---
title: "Economic Intelligence"
---

# 🌍 African Economic Intelligence

<div class="glass-card">

Daho Wealth provides data-driven economic intelligence for Africa's emerging markets, helping households, businesses, investors, researchers, and policymakers monitor inflation, consumer prices, exchange rates, and market conditions.

</div>

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="metric-card">

## 🛒 Basket of Goods & Inflation Explorer

Interactive market intelligence platform for analyzing consumer prices, inflation trends, city comparisons, and historical market movements.

**Features**
- Price Trends
- Inflation Rankings
- City Comparisons
- Historical Data
- Data Export
- Forecasting

[Launch Full Explorer](https://5ff85h-oscens0jp0sossavi.shinyapps.io/benin-inflation-explorer/){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

<iframe
  src="https://5ff85h-oscens0jp0sossavi.shinyapps.io/benin-inflation-explorer/"
  width="100%"
  height="1200"
  style="border:0; border-radius:16px; margin-top:20px;">
</iframe>

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 🥖 Food Price Dashboard

Executive dashboard providing quick visibility into food price movements, inflation indicators, and market conditions.

[Open Food Price Dashboard](https://dashboard.dahowealth.com/economy){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

</div>

<div class="metric-card">

## 💱 Forex Hub

Monitor African currencies, exchange-rate trends, currency performance, and conversion tools.

[Launch Forex Hub](https://dashboard.dahowealth.com/fx){.btn .btn-primary target="_blank"}

</div>

</div>


---

<div class="glass-card">

## 🌐 Regional Coverage

### Active Coverage

🇧🇯 Benin  
🇳🇪 Niger  
🇳🇬 Nigeria

### Expansion Roadmap

🇧🇫 Burkina Faso  
🇨🇻 Cabo Verde  
🇨🇮 Côte d'Ivoire  
🇬🇲 Gambia  
🇬🇭 Ghana  
🇬🇳 Guinea  
🇬🇼 Guinea-Bissau  
🇱🇷 Liberia  
🇲🇱 Mali  
🇸🇳 Senegal  
🇸🇱 Sierra Leone  
🇹🇬 Togo

Future releases will include:

- Country Economic Profiles
- Inflation Heat Maps
- Cost of Living Indexes
- Commodity Intelligence
- Regional Economic Dashboards

</div>

<div class="site-footer">
  <p>
    © 2026 Daho Wealth • Financial & Economic Intelligence Platform
  </p>

  <p>
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/jpsossavi/" target="_blank">
      LinkedIn
    </a>

    •

    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/p/Daho-Wealth-61575871481173/" target="_blank">
      Facebook
    </a>
  </p>
</div>
